'''Trox''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] henchman of [[8t88/Legends|8t88]], along with [[Hontho]] and [[Rol (Human)|Rol]]. In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], he was killed by [[Kyle Katarn]] who infiltrated the [[Government House (Sulon)|Government House]] in order to get information on the [[Valley of the Jedi]].

{{Char-stub}}
